center.name: 法属南部和南极领地
center.summary: 法属南部和南极领地是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Grey-backed storm petrel、White-bellied storm petrel、Black-bellied storm petrel等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Antarctica, Argentina, Australia, Bouvet Island, Brazil, Chile, Falkland Islands, French Polynesia, French Southern Territories, Madagascar, Mozambique, New Zealand, Oman, Peru, Saint Helena, São Tomé and Príncipe, Solomon Islands, South Africa, South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands, Uruguay, and Vanuatu

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is monotypic within the genus Garrodia. It is found in Antarctica, Argentina, Australia, Chile, Falkland Islands, French Southern Territories, New Zealand, Saint Helena, South Africa, and South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Angola, Argentina, Australia, Brazil, Chile, Ecuador, French Polynesia, French Southern Territories, Maldives, Namibia, New Zealand, Perú, Saint Helena, and South Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: However, vagrant individuals have been identified all over South and Central America, Asia, and Oceania as seen below. Vagrants have been found in Chile, Colombia, Costa Rica, Ecuador, El Salvador, French Southern Territories, Guatemala, Indonesia, Japan, Kiribati, Marshall Islands, Nauru, Nicaragua, Niue, Norfolk Island, Northern Mariana Islands, Palau, Panama, Papua New Guinea, Peru, Philippines, Pitcairn, Samoa, Tokelau, Tonga, Tuvalu, United States Minor Outlying Islands, and Wallis and Futuna. The Tahiti petrel requires both terrestrial and marine systems and is often found in both shallow and oceanic marine habitats as well as shrubland and forest habitat types. In terms of marine habitats, they prefer water with surface temperatures higher than 25°C. Consequently, El Niño events may have an influence on their abundance in waters of the East Pacific.{{Cite journal |last1=Ribic |first1=Christine A
